title: Failure Debugging
description: Reproduce the failing command, isolate the first failing invariant, inspect fixture output, and state root cause with ex
body: Reproduce the failing command, isolate the first failing invariant, inspect fixture output, and state root cause with exact evidence before changing product code. This skill is used by OAL acceptance and route execution to keep investigation evidence-based and avoid speculative fixes. It must be rendered into provider skill surfaces and referenced by route or agent contracts.
